item.name: Oho Hunu
item.description:
This diminutive wavekin is known as one of the swiftest swimmers in Ihuykatumu.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: In the Hanuhanu tongue, Oho Hunu means “windflame.” The name refers both to the wavekin's impressive speed and the burning red gradation extending to the tip of its tail fin.
